title: Run automation on Mirror Column Date

posts.author: DannyVFilm (Daniel von Seckendorff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Current setup:
Main working board with Groups relevant to stage of item. Secondary board with Groups filtering by This Week, This Month, Upcoming. Secondary items are created when main board triggers automation.

Problem: Mirror Column Dates can’t be used for automations to move items between Groups. Current solution is to copy Date from Main working board to Secondary board. Issue is if the date changes of the Main working board, it won’t update on the Secondary board.

Solution: allow automations for Mirror Columns.
